instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Choosing a book
task.initialEmail: Hi,||We need to choose a book for our reading club. [1]Do you want to read a mystery story?[/1]||[2]The book has 250 pages. Is that too long?[/2]||[3]Where should we meet to talk about it?[/3]||[4]Should everyone read the whole book before the meeting?[/4]||Let me know||Tara

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Tara,||Thanks for your message. [1]I don’t really want to read a mystery story, but maybe we could choose a funny book instead because it would be more enjoyable.[/1]||[2]No, I don’t think 250 pages is too long because we have three weeks before the next meeting.[/2]||[3]We should meet in the library because it is quiet and there are big tables where we can sit together.[/3]||[4]In my opinion, everyone should read the whole book before the meeting, or the discussion won’t be very useful.[/4]||See you soon,||Beth
